catalog.title: Application Registry
catalog.subtitle: Declaratively edit the business-app registry (YAML). The server validates on apply.
catalog.conflict: The catalog was updated by someone else. Reload and retry.

versions.title: Version history
versions.rollbackConfirm: Roll back to version {version}? This creates a new version.

pendingDeactivate.title: Pending deactivation
pendingDeactivate.confirmBody: Deactivate {name}? Keycloak roles are left untouched and {count} active assignment(s) are NOT revoked — it becomes a deactivated tombstone.
